=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/12/03, Winter Park, Colorado, Winter Park Resort, 2CDR

This recording has the same problems described for the BW version:
some wind noise; pa goes out for a few seconds on d1t6 5:5x; end of d2t5 is cut
Very good sound

CD1

1 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, (Bob on piano and Larry on acoustic guitar), 2 My Back Pages (acoustic), (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern, Freddie on acoustic guitar), 3 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 4 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 5 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 6 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp), 7 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 8 Positively 4th Street (Bob on piano), 9 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar),

CD2

1 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano and Tony on standup bass), 2 Drifter's Escape (Bob on piano and harp), 3 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 4 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 5 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp) 


Concert # 1525 of The Never-Ending Tour. First concert of the 2003 US Summer Tour. 2003 concert # 35.
Concert # 24 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

2, 6 acoustic with the band.
2, 6, 11, 14 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2 Larry Campbell (cittern).
9 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

Note. First ever concert in Winter Park, Colorado.
